subject: [PATCH v2 1/2] nilfs2: fix 64-bit division operations in nilfs_bmap_find_target_in_group()

reviews.author: Jeff Layton
reviews.summary: Suggested using a compile-time assertion to simplify the division operation and proposed sending a respin.
